plan_metrics.plan_content:
## Plan Summary

**Root Cause:** Classic off-by-one error in `src/utils.ts`, line 7.

```typescript
// BUGGY — stops one iteration too early
for (let i = 0; i < items.length - 1; i++) {

// FIXED — iterates over all items
for (let i = 0; i < items.length; i++) {
```

The `- 1` in the loop condition means the last index is never reached. For a single-item array `["test"]`, the condition `i < 0` is immediately false, so nothing runs at all.

**Impact on tests** (`tests/utils.test.ts`):
- ❌ `should process all items in the array` — returns `["HELLO","WORLD"]` instead of `["HELLO","WORLD","FOO"]`
- ❌ `should handle a single item` — returns `[]` instead of `["TEST"]`
- ❌ `should handle two items` — returns `["A"]` instead of `["A","B"]`
- ✅ `should return empty array for empty input` — already passes (empty array has no last item to skip)

**The fix is a single `- 1` removal on line 7.** All 6 tests (including the `sum` tests which are unaffected) will pass after the fix.
